title: TitleScreen Cleaner
description: Cleans up the TitleScreen from unnecessary buttons and texts.
body:
# *TitleScreen Cleaner*
This minimalist mod cleans up the TitleScreen from unnecessary buttons and texts.
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584d316e559ba1784e8e8531e2ea1213004bae93.webp)
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required. \
The mod works in 1.21+, and I have no plans to make it available for earlier versions.
